text: We are a Series C enterprise SaaS company ($85M ARR, 62% gross margins) built on a horizontal workflow platform. Our three largest customers (22% of ARR) are healthcare systems who have asked us to build HIPAA-compliant clinical workflow modules. Our product team believes this vertical play could reach $200M ARR in 3 years but would require hiring 40 domain specialists and splitting the engineering org. Our horizontal platform growth has decelerated from 45% to 28% YoY. Two board members oppose the pivot, citing dilution of brand and engineering focus. One board member, a healthcare investor, is pushing hard for it.
